extraction.one_line_summary: MCNULTY Brandon soloed from a 10-rider breakaway on the final classified climb 45km out, gaining 1:58 while Roglic took yellow as Vennot cracked.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma controlled for Roglic despite 18 DNS from illness, suggesting depleted peloton created breakaway opportunities they accepted.
McNulty attacked final classified climb from breakaway not descent, gaining 30 seconds before unclassified 6km rise at 12km-to-go.
Ineos attempted late isolation of Roglic on unclassified climb but Martinez given no room by peloton marking.

rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: First WorldTour win converting early season form into stage-hunting ability, can TT away from quality breakaway companions
rider_signals.VENNOT Clement: negative: Yellow jersey dropped on non-summit climb before final classified ascent, revealing fragility under Soudal control
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Lost all teammates early but defended without counterattacking when Yates/Vlasov probed unclassified climb
rider_signals.JORGENSEN Matteo: positive: Took significant GC time (likely 3+ minutes) by making chase group from breakaway on difficult technical descent
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: positive: Tried forcing gap in reduced peloton sprint at 5:43 down, showing ambition despite GC loss
